summary: Backend API Testing - Iteration 14 COMPLETE. 14/14 tests PASS. All 5 cleanup fixes (FIX 14-18) verified working. Fixed a bug in get_user_stats endpoint that was reading from wrong data source.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ FIX 14: GET /api/auth/me does NOT have streak_days field (removed from UserResponse)
✓ FIX 14: GET /api/users/{user_id}/stats has streak_days sourced from user_stats collection
✓ FIX 14 BUG FIXED: get_user_stats endpoint was reading from user.user_stats (embedded, doesn't exist) instead of user_stats collection - fixed to use get_or_create_user_stats()
✓ FIX 15: GET /api/auth/me does NOT have rocket10_completed, rocket10_day, rocket10_start_date fields
✓ FIX 15: Login response user does NOT have rocket10_completed or streak_days
✓ FIX 15: POST /api/problems response does NOT have willing_to_pay field
✓ FIX 16: GET /api/auth/me has onboarding_completed=true for existing admin (startup migration worked)
✓ FIX 16: PUT /api/users/me/profile with only {onboarding_completed: false} works (no displayName required)
✓ FIX 18: Search by title word finds the problem correctly
✓ FIX 18: Search does NOT match on when_happens content (only title is indexed)
✓ FIX 18: Search does NOT match on who_affected content (only title is indexed)
✓ Regression: POST /api/auth/login returns valid token and user
✓ Regression: PUT /api/users/me/profile with displayName change works
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 3043-3060: fixed get_user_stats_endpoint to read from user_stats collection)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test problems created with prefix 'TEST_' for each test, cleaned up after each test. Admin posts_today counter was reset during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 cleanup fixes (FIX 14-18) verified working. Key changes: 1) streak_days removed from User model and UserResponse, now only in user_stats collection, 2) rocket10_* fields removed from User model, 3) willing_to_pay removed from Problem model, 4) is_pinned removed from Comment model (still exists on Problem), 5) onboarding_completed added to User model with startup migration, 6) Search only matches on title (when_happens and who_affected removed from $or query). BUG FIXED: get_user_stats endpoint was reading from wrong data source. Frontend is React Native (Expo) - cannot be tested via browser.

features_verified.fix14_user_stats_has_streak_days: PASS - streak_days from user_stats collection (BUG FIXED)
features_verified.fix15_no_rocket10_fields: PASS - rocket10_* fields removed from UserResponse
features_verified.fix18_search_not_when_happens: PASS - search does NOT match when_happens
features_verified.fix18_search_not_who_affected: PASS - search does NOT match who_affected

bug_fixed.description: get_user_stats endpoint was reading streak_days from user.user_stats (embedded field that doesn't exist) instead of the user_stats collection
bug_fixed.fix: Changed from user.get('user_stats', {}) to await get_or_create_user_stats(user_id)
bug_fixed.impact: streak_days was always returning 0 before the fix

notes: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. Frontend testing via Playwright is not possible. All 5 cleanup fixes have been verified working through comprehensive backend API tests.
